stage: Backend Stage 4A Insighta Labs+ System Design

verification.summary: Stage 4A submission-ready after simplification. All seven gates remain closed. Evidence E-008 records the post-review correction from a dense infrastructure presentation to a compact final draft and a simplified architecture diagram. The core design is the existing Stage 3 API plus bounded query validation, normalized cache keys, short-lived query-result caching, PostgreSQL indexing, batch ingestion, and observability. Read replicas, materialized aggregates, and external poolers are conditional scale levers only.

submission.sharing_requirement: Anyone with the link can view
submission.operator_checklist: Use drafts/insighta-labs-stage4-design.md as the Google Docs body, embed diagrams/exported/architecture.png under Section 6, add a public link to diagrams/source/architecture.mmd, confirm 2-7 pages, then set sharing to Anyone with the link can view.

next_exact_step: Operator: replace the Google Doc body with drafts/insighta-labs-stage4-design.md, embed diagrams/exported/architecture.png under Section 6, add a public link to diagrams/source/architecture.mmd directly below the image, confirm the document is 2-7 pages at default styling, set sharing to 'Anyone with the link can view', and submit before 2026-05-05 23:59 WAT. After submission, proceed to Stage 4B in the Stage 3 repo.
